mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PATCHNOTE_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PATCHNOTE ( PATCHNOTE_NO, GAME_CODE, TITLE, POST_DATE, PATCHNOTE_CONTENT ) VALUES ( #{patchnoteNo}, #{gameCode}, #{title}, DEFAULT, #{patchnoteContent} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TITLE, POST_DATE FROM NOTICE ORDER BY NOTICE_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TITLE, POST_DATE FROM PATCHNOTE ORDER BY PATCHNOTE_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT BOARD_NO AS boardNo , GAME_CODE AS gameCode , BOARD_CONTENT AS boardContent , BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, USER_NAME AS userName , POST_DATE AS postDate , ANSWER_STATUS AS answerStatus FROM INQUIRY ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC
SELECT USER_NO AS userNo , USER_ID as userId , USER_NAME as userName , EMAIL as email , WITHDRAW as withdraw , ENROLL_DATE as enrollDate FROM LOG_GG_USER ORDER BY USER_NO DESC
